title: Slideshow(Fabric)
description:
a Minecraft mod that adds a "Slide Show Projector" block. This block can projects any online image into the world.
original author:  teaconmc.
This Mod is ported to the Fabric platform by Jonathan, zbx1425 and AIDA64S
body:
Slideshow

Fabric API is required.

**Warning! Although 1.0.3 is theoretically possible to load a 1.0.2 version world, you still need to back up your world first! The server and client versions of a multiplayer game must be the same**

Slideshow is a Minecraft mod that adds a Slideshow Projector block. This block can project online images (including GIF's) into the world. This fork is a multi-build (Fabric and Forge) adaptation of [TeaConMC's Slide Show](https://github.com/teaconmc/SlideShow) under the BSD-3-Clause license. ![image1](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AIDA64S/Slideshow/master/docs/preview.png) Simply right-click the block to open the GUI and paste in the URL to the image. There are also several options to adjust the dimensions, offset, and orientation. Hover over these icons for more details. ![image2](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AIDA64S/Slideshow/master/docs/gui.png)

Questions? Comments? Complaints?
